name: flowwright
description: AI workflow compiler that turns human demonstrations into tested, executable applications using OpenAI and Codex.

scripts.format: prettier --write README.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml examples/invoice-approval apps/web/src apps/web/tests apps/web/*.json apps/web/*.ts apps/web/*.mjs apps/extension/src apps/extension/public apps/extension/*.json apps/extension/*.md packages/workflow-schema/src packages/*/*.json packages/*/*.mjs docs/index.html docs/styles.css docs/app.js .github
scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml examples/invoice-approval apps/web/src apps/web/tests apps/web/*.json apps/web/*.ts apps/web/*.mjs apps/extension/src apps/extension/public apps/extension/*.json apps/extension/*.md packages/workflow-schema/src packages/*/*.json packages/*/*.mjs docs/index.html docs/styles.css docs/app.js .github
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm --filter @flowwright/extension validate
